title: Streaming Events, Accessible Status, Cancellation, Reconnect, and Rendering · Behavior Case: Stream Reconnect Dedup
summary: Token deltas overwrite tool status, every chunk is announced, focus jumps, cancel is mouse-only, reconnect duplicates output, and color is the only failure signal. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the stream reconnect dedup increment in accessible typed agent event stream. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, change…
objectives: Resume streams from sequence or snapshot, deduplicate events, reconcile terminal state, and avoid replaying side effects after reconnect.
Provide keyboard-operable pause, cancel, approve, reject, retry, details, and recovery controls with visible focus and large targets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-stream-reconnect-dedup — Resume streams from sequence or snapshot, deduplicate events, reconcile terminal state, and avoid replaying side effects after reconnect.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-streaming-events-accessibility-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-streaming-events-accessibility-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_streaming_events_accessibility_5(events: int = 80, assembled_events: int = 80, announced_milestones: int = 8, cancellable_states: int = 5, duplicate_events: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if events < 1 or assembled_events < 0:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-event-count"
    if assembled_events != events:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-assembly"
    if announced_milestones < 4 or cancellable_states < 2:
        return False, announced_milestones, "accessible-stream-control"
    if duplicate_events > 0:
        return False, duplicate_events, "stream-duplication"
    assert assembled_events == events and duplicate_events == 0
    return True, assembled_events, "accessible-agent-event-stream"

# Evidence: agentpy-stream-reconnect-dedup-leg4h7
# Competency: agentpy-stream-reconnect-dedup.
# Case 3156: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.

def evidence_agentpy_stream_reconnect_dedup_leg4h7(events: int = 80, assembled_events: int = 80, announced_milestones: int = 8, cancellable_states: int = 5, duplicate_events: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:

        "tool7h4gel",
